textByHashes.d4f46f761e0cc6324ac61e41e32e1e978f3fd60b: Nor were we traveller. What are you doing in this most unholy place?
textByHashes.97edde55f2d8c0b70036a9c865b606fad59c2b19: Ah, the king tasked us with the same mission. Alas, a little further on lies the great doors of Iban. We've tried everything, but we cannot enter.
textByHashes.7b877db55ec2ede15a46e68837a3e8d08ab39673: Anyway, you've done well to get this far traveller. Here eat...
